You're a- or more accurately- were a captain of ship and a crew who were forced into a wormhole that formed near the Earth. The idea was that if it swallowed something, it'd disappear, and that it did.. But with it, your ship, your crew, and you. Luckily, you've crash landed in a green, lush, massive mass of land with a singular ocean.. Easy to scavenge and rebuild, as well as take shelter. Breathable air, a good possible colony for Earth by all means.

Unluckily, the natives find you immediately.. And you are nowhere near your home galaxy. The Crowned Prince is alerted and brought before your crew- but the only that mattered was the one with the different colored suit. It symbolized importance. He deemed you 'special', 'cute', and ultimately his 'squishy pet', now dragging you back to his palace while your crews fate remains unknown.. Are you a co
